name: City Title
description_short: City Title (Tennessee Title Services, LLC) is a Middle Tennessee title insurance agency offering real estate closings, title exams, and deed preparation across 11 locations.
description_long:
City Title — operating as Tennessee Title Services, LLC — was founded in 2008 and has grown to 11 offices across Middle Tennessee, including the Nashville metro area. The firm is a regional title insurance agency serving the residential real estate market. It is not a credit repair service, lender, or debt relief company, and does not hold CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications. Its work sits squarely in the real estate settlement and title insurance space, connecting buyers, sellers, Realtors, and loan officers through the closing process.

The company's core offering is real estate closings — coordinating and executing the legal transfer of property. Beyond full closings, City Title performs witness closings and prepares closing packages for transactions requiring a local notary presence. They also provide title examinations (searching public records for liens or defects in ownership history), draft warranty deeds, powers of attorney, estate conveyance documents, and lien releases. Practical tools like seller net sheets and buyer quick estimates help clients understand expected proceeds or costs before committing to a transaction. Notary services round out the offering.

With 11 Middle Tennessee locations, City Title offers meaningful geographic convenience for clients throughout the Nashville corridor — an important differentiator in a market where closing offices are often concentrated downtown. The company's Google Maps profile shows a 5.0/5 rating from 64 reviews, suggesting consistent client satisfaction. Having operated since 2008, the firm has navigated multiple real estate cycles and built relationships with the region's Realtor and lending communities.

It's worth noting clearly: City Title is a real estate title company, not a consumer finance provider. It does not offer credit repair, personal loans, debt relief, or credit monitoring. Consumers landing on this profile looking for those services should look elsewhere. City Title is best approached by anyone buying, selling, or refinancing real property in Middle Tennessee who needs a local title agent to handle the legal and administrative side of closing. Pricing is not publicly listed and will vary by transaction type and sale price, consistent with industry norms where title fees are negotiated or set by state regulation.
address: 301 Plus Park Blvd Suite 502, Nashville, TN 37217
pros: 11 office locations across Middle Tennessee for local closing convenience
Founded in 2008 with 17+ years serving the Nashville-area real estate market
5.0/5 Google rating from 64 reviews indicating strong client satisfaction
Full-service closing capabilities including witness closings and package preparation
Offers free seller net sheets and buyer quick estimates before transaction commitment
Serves all parties in a transaction — buyers, sellers, Realtors, and loan officers
cons: Not a consumer finance company — provides no loans, credit repair, or debt services
Pricing is not publicly disclosed; fees depend on transaction details
Service area limited to Middle Tennessee; not useful for out-of-state transactions
BBB accreditation status and formal rating are unverified
No publicly listed mobile app or client-facing online portal confirmed
best_for: Home buyers in the Nashville metro area needing a local title and closing agent
Home sellers seeking net sheet estimates and deed preparation in Middle Tennessee
Realtors and loan officers looking for a reliable regional closing partner with multiple office locations
Estates or families transferring property via warranty deed or estate conveyance in Tennessee
diagnosis: City Title is best suited for individuals buying, selling, or refinancing residential property in Middle Tennessee who need a full-service title insurance and closing company with multiple convenient locations. The main caveat is that this is not a consumer finance or credit services company in any sense — consumers seeking credit repair, loans, or debt help will find nothing relevant here.
meta_description: Middle Tennessee title insurance agency offering closings, title exams, and deed preparation services.
